subcodes.first_line: O thou who makest mention of Me and proclaimest My Cause! Thou hast summoned all unto My Self and announced unto all My manifestation and My dawning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ذاکری و مبشر امری قد دعوت الکل الی نفسی و اخبرت الکل بظهوری و طلوعی و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
